prompt: Modify image 1 by replacing the image under 'Model A' with the gooey green monster from image 2 and the image under 'Model B' with the spiky green monster from image 3, creating a monster generation comparison UI. Additionally, change the sentence 'A woman in a purple snow jacket is skiing' to 'A green monster eating.'
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1. In the left panel labeled 'Model A', replace the current image with the gooey, three-eyed green monster holding a lollipop from Image 2. In the right panel labeled 'Model B', replace the current image with the spiky, sharp-toothed green monster holding a fly from Image 3. Furthermore, update the text string at the bottom center of the interface from 'A woman in a purple snow jacket is skiing' to 'A green monster eating'.
objects: Gooey, three-eyed green monster (in left panel)
Lollipop (held by monster in left panel)
Spiky, sharp-toothed green monster (in right panel)
Fly (held by monster in right panel)
Text string 'A green monster eating' (at bottom center)
Interactive buttons (e.g., Send, Random sample, vote buttons)
